name: Seafood Soup with Garlic and Ginger
recipeIngredient: 1 pinch Ginger root (size of a thumb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Use metal blade: Add onion, garlic, ginger, and chop with 4 or 5 quick pulses.
Remove from bowl.
2. Refit with a medium slicing disc. Slice leeks through the small tube.
Remove.
3. Heat butter in a saucepan and add onion, garlic, ginger, and leeks. Cook
for 10 minutes until veggies are very tender and fragrant.
4. Cut seafood into approximately 1/2 inch pieces. Add to veggies and cook
for 1 minute.
5. Add stock and bring to a boil. Cook for 5 minutes. Season with salt and
pepper. Meanwhile, with the work bowl fitted with a thin slicing disc,
slice green onions through the small feed tube. Cook for 1 minute and then serve.
This recipe has a wonderful flavor but may need some adaptations to make in
quantity. I have thought about trying it with chicken instead of seafood.
